skill.name: longbridge-content
skill.description:
Latest news articles, regulatory filings, community discussion topics for listed stocks, and SEC EDGAR filing analysis (10-K/10-Q/8-K/proxy/Form 4) via Longbridge.
Triggers: "新闻", "公告", "资讯", "话题", "社区讨论", "SEC", "10-K", "10-Q", "8-K", "Form 4", "新聞", "公告", "資訊", "話題", "社區討論", "news", "filing", "announcement", "topic", "community", "SEC filing", "annual report", "quarterly report", "proxy", "insider filing", "regulatory rules", "监管规则", "涨跌停", "漲跌停", "T+1", "PDT rule", "熔断", "熔斷", "circuit breaker", "margin rules", "保证金", "保證金", "監管規則"
skill.summary: Access news, filings, community topics, and SEC EDGAR analysis for stocks via Longbridge.
skill.author: longbridge

security_audit.summary: This is a prompt-only skill containing only markdown documentation. The 66 'external_commands' findings are false positives from backtick characters in inline code formatting (e.g., `` `longbridge` ``) and bash code blocks. The 8 'weak cryptographic algorithm' findings are false positives matching the word 'cryptocurrency' in regulatory knowledge base text. No executable code, scripts, or network calls exist. The skill only instructs the LLM to invoke the `longbridge` CLI at runtime.

low_findings.title: Backtick patterns in markdown flagged as shell execution
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged 66 locations with 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' pattern. All instances are inline code formatting in markdown (e.g., `longbridge`, `news`, `topic`, `format json`) or content inside fenced bash code blocks in documentation. No actual shell execution occurs in any file.

low_findings.title: Cryptocurrency keyword flagged as weak cryptography
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged 8 locations with 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' pattern. All instances are references to cryptocurrency regulation in the regulatory knowledge base (a documentation file about financial market rules). No cryptographic code exists in the skill.

content.user_title: Access Stock News, Filings & SEC Documents
content.value_statement: Investors need quick access to news, regulatory filings, and community sentiment for any stock. This skill fetches all of that from Longbridge in one prompt, with structured classification and bilingual output.
actual_capabilities: Fetch latest news articles for any stock symbol with full article content
List and retrieve regulatory filings (annual reports, interim reports, announcements)
Access community discussion topics with sentiment overview and hot-topic identification
Analyze SEC EDGAR filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, proxy, Form 4) for investment signals
Answer regulatory questions about A-share, HK, and US market rules from a built-in knowledge base
Classify news into catalyst, regulatory, strategic, financial, opinion, and other buckets
limitations: Cannot access real-time or intraday news updates beyond what the Longbridge dataset provides
Community topic sentiment is coarse-grained, not a precise quantitative score
SEC filing analysis is only available for US-listed stocks
No historical archive beyond what Longbridge's dataset contains
Regulatory knowledge base may not reflect the very latest rule changes

use_cases.title: Pre-trade news check
use_cases.description: An individual investor wants to know what happened with a stock before placing an order. The skill pulls the latest news and filings in seconds.

use_cases.title: Earnings season preparation
use_cases.description: An analyst needs to review 10-K risk factors, MD&A tone, and Form 4 insider signals for a quarterly report. The skill structures the analysis automatically.

use_cases.title: Regulatory rule lookup
use_cases.description: A cross-market investor needs to know if a stock is subject to price limits, what the T+1 settlement rule is, or how PDT works. The knowledge base gives instant answers.

prompt_templates.title: Basic news check
prompt_templates.prompt: What is the latest news for NVDA.US?
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick news overview for a single stock

prompt_templates.title: Filing search
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the most recent annual report and any 8-K filings for AAPL.US.

prompt_templates.title: Community sentiment scan
prompt_templates.prompt: What are investors saying about TSLA.US on the community forum? Show hot topics and overall sentiment.

prompt_templates.title: SEC filing deep-dive
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze the latest 10-K for MSFT.US — focus on new risk factors, MD&A tone, and any non-recurring items.

output: NVDA.US news digest — Source: Longbridge Securities
Earnings / fundamentals (3): Q3 revenue beat estimates by 4%, data-center segment up 94% YoY
Strategic / business (2): Announced partnership with AWS on AI training clusters
Regulatory / compliance (1): EU antitrust review of GPU supply contracts
Analyst opinions (4): Goldman raised target to $1,200; Morgan Stanley reiterated Overweight
Key takeaway: Strong data-center growth and raised guidance; regulatory overhang remains.
TSLA.US community discussion — Source: Longbridge Securities
Positive: FSD v13 release reception, Cybertruck delivery milestones
Negative: Recent price weakness, margin compression concerns

best_practices: Specify the symbol clearly using CODE.MARKET format (e.g., NVDA.US, 700.HK, 600519.SH) to avoid mapping errors
Use the depth selection table to choose between news-only, filings-only, topic-only, or full overview
Always include the not-investment-advice disclaimer in the final output to the user
Fall back to WebSearch with a clear source label only when Longbridge data is stale or unavailable
anti_patterns: Do not echo hype vocabulary from community topics (e.g., 涨停板, all in, 必涨) — downgrade to neutral language
Do not quote individual community comments verbatim — report sentiment as a coarse skew only
Do not dump raw news titles — always classify into the 6 standard buckets before presenting

faq.question: Does this skill require a Longbridge account?
faq.answer: No. News, filings, and community topics are public. SEC filing analysis is also public. No login is needed.

faq.question: Can I get real-time or intraday news?
faq.answer: No. The skill provides news as captured by the Longbridge dataset. If the latest item is more than 7 days old, a WebSearch fallback is used.

faq.question: Does this work for Hong Kong and A-share stocks?
faq.answer: Yes for news, filings, and community topics. SEC EDGAR analysis is US-listed stocks only.

faq.question: How is community sentiment measured?
faq.answer: Sentiment is a coarse skew (positive, neutral, negative) based on topic content and reply counts, not a precise quantitative score.

faq.question: Can I search news by keyword without a symbol?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the news search or topic search commands with a keyword instead of a ticker symbol.

faq.question: Is this skill giving investment advice?
faq.answer: No. All outputs include a disclaimer that the data is for reference only and does not constitute investment advice.
